label: Transparent Monarch motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Monarch transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated monarch butterfly wing/body motif for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A monarch butterfly with vivid orange wing panels, black vein structure, cream-white edge spots, subtle milkweed-green reflected tones, accurate anatomy, crisp silhouette edges, and natural wing-scale texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show both wings, body, antennae, and edge spots without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves orange panels, black veining, cream spots, and fine wing texture.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat removable chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation.
Constraints: no dragonfly, no grape, no strawberry, no parrot, no raspberry, no maple leaves, no flowers as the main subject, no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no second insect.

label: Light design-system board
prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive light-mode design-system board for "Morphous Monarch" / "Monarch Butterfly Wing", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme. Use monarch orange, wing black, cream-white spots, milkweed green, pollen gold, meadow paper, dusty milkweed, and deep wing brown. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation, dashboard, forms, table, command/search, status, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and tokens. Use monarch wing-cell cards, black vein-like dividers, cream spot indicators, orange active states, milkweed-green support, and pollen-gold focus rings. Exclude dragonfly, grape, strawberry, parrot, raspberry, maple leaves, generic purple gradients, unrelated saturated colors, random brands, and misspellings.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Monarch" / "Monarch Butterfly Wing", translated from the light board and the same motif. Keep the same monarch wing-cell component language, high contrast orange/black/cream palette, milkweed green and pollen gold accents, meadow paper neutrals adapted into dark mode, dusty milkweed, and deep wing brown. Include readable English and Japanese typography guidance plus palette, typography, components, navigation, dashboard, forms, table, command/search, status, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, and tokens. Preserve orange active states, cream foreground, green support, gold focus, black vein dividers, and wing-cell panels. Exclude dragonfly, grape, strawberry, parrot, raspberry, maple leaves, neon colors, generic purple gradients, unrelated saturated colors, random brands, and misspellings.
